verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus, in Salomonem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁלֹמֹ֨ה ׀ אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים מִ֭שְׁפָּטֶיךָ לְמֶ֣לֶךְ תֵּ֑ן וְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ לְבֶן־מֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.king_james: Give the king thy judgments, O God, and thy righteousness unto the king’s son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, judicium tuum regi da,  et justitiam tuam filio regis ;  judicare populum tuum in justitia,  et pauperes tuos in judicio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָדִ֣ין עַמְּךָ֣ בְצֶ֑דֶק וַעֲנִיֶּ֥יךָ בְמִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.king_james: He shall judge thy people with righteousness, and thy poor with judgment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscipiant montes pacem populo,  et colles justitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׂא֤וּ הָרִ֓ים שָׁ֘ל֥וֹם לָעָ֑ם וּ֝גְבָע֗וֹת בִּצְדָקָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The mountains shall bring peace to the people, and the little hills, by righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judicabit pauperes populi,  et salvos faciet filios pauperum,  et humiliabit calumniatorem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁפֹּ֤ט ׀ עֲֽנִיֵּי־עָ֗ם י֭וֹשִׁיעַ לִבְנֵ֣י אֶבְי֑וֹן וִ֖ידַכֵּ֣א עוֹשֵֽׁק׃
verses.king_james: He shall judge the poor of the people, he shall save the children of the needy, and shall break in pieces the oppressor.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et permanebit cum sole, et ante lunam,  in generatione et generationem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִירָא֥וּךָ עִם־שָׁ֑מֶשׁ וְלִפְנֵ֥י יָ֝רֵ֗חַ דּ֣וֹר דּוֹרִֽים׃
verses.king_james: They shall fear thee as long as the sun and moon endure, throughout all generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Descendet sicut pluvia in vellus,  et sicut stillicidia stillantia super terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֭רֵד כְּמָטָ֣ר עַל־גֵּ֑ז כִּ֝רְבִיבִ֗ים זַרְזִ֥יף אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: He shall come down like rain upon the mown grass: as showers that water the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Orietur in diebus ejus justitia, et abundantia pacis,  donec auferatur luna.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִֽפְרַח־בְּיָמָ֥יו צַדִּ֑יק וְרֹ֥ב שָׁ֝ל֗וֹם עַד־בְּלִ֥י יָרֵֽחַ׃
verses.king_james: In his days shall the righteous flourish; and abundance of peace so long as the moon endureth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dominabitur a mari usque ad mare,  et a flumine usque ad terminos orbis terrarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֭יֵרְדְּ מִיָּ֣ם עַד־יָ֑ם וּ֝מִנָּהָ֗ר עַד־אַפְסֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: He shall have dominion also from sea to sea, and from the river unto the ends of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Coram illo procident Æthiopes,  et inimici ejus terram lingent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭פָנָיו יִכְרְע֣וּ צִיִּ֑ים וְ֝אֹיְבָ֗יו עָפָ֥ר יְלַחֵֽכוּ׃
verses.king_james: They that dwell in the wilderness shall bow before him; and his enemies shall lick the dust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reges Tharsis et insulæ munera offerent ;  reges Arabum et Saba dona adducent :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַלְכֵ֬י תַרְשִׁ֣ישׁ וְ֭אִיִּים מִנְחָ֣ה יָשִׁ֑יבוּ מַלְכֵ֥י שְׁבָ֥א וּ֝סְבָ֗א אֶשְׁכָּ֥ר יַקְרִֽיבוּ׃
verses.king_james: The kings of Tarshish and of the isles shall bring presents: the kings of Sheba and Seba shall offer gifts.

verses.latin_vulgate: et adorabunt eum omnes reges terræ ;  omnes gentes servient ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ־ל֥וֹ כׇל־מְלָכִ֑ים כׇּל־גּוֹיִ֥ם יַעַבְדֽוּהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Yea, all kings shall fall down before him: all nations shall serve him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia liberabit pauperem a potente,  et pauperem cui non erat adjutor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יַ֭צִּיל אֶבְי֣וֹן מְשַׁוֵּ֑עַ וְ֝עָנִ֗י וְֽאֵין־עֹזֵ֥ר לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For he shall deliver the needy when he crieth; the poor also, and him that hath no helper.

verses.latin_vulgate: Parcet pauperi et inopi,  et animas pauperum salvas faciet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֭חֹס עַל־דַּ֣ל וְאֶבְי֑וֹן וְנַפְשׁ֖וֹת אֶבְיוֹנִ֣ים יוֹשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.king_james: He shall spare the poor and needy, and shall save the souls of the needy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ex usuris et iniquitate redimet animas eorum,  et honorabile nomen eorum coram illo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִתּ֣וֹךְ וּ֭מֵחָמָס יִגְאַ֣ל נַפְשָׁ֑ם וְיֵיקַ֖ר דָּמָ֣ם בְּעֵינָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: He shall redeem their soul from deceit and violence: and precious shall their blood be in his sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vivet, et dabitur ei de auro Arabiæ ;  et adorabunt de ipso semper,  tota die benedicent ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיחִ֗י וְיִתֶּן־לוֹ֮ מִזְּהַ֢ב שְׁ֫בָ֥א וְיִתְפַּלֵּ֣ל בַּעֲד֣וֹ תָמִ֑יד כׇּל־הַ֝יּ֗וֹם יְבָרְכֶֽנְהוּ׃
verses.king_james: And he shall live, and to him shall be given of the gold of Sheba: prayer also shall be made for him continually; and daily shall he be praised.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit firmamentum in terra in summis montium ;  superextolletur super Libanum fructus ejus,  et florebunt de civitate sicut fœnum terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִ֤י פִסַּת־בַּ֨ר ׀ בָּאָרֶץ֮ בְּרֹ֢אשׁ הָ֫רִ֥ים יִרְעַ֣שׁ כַּלְּבָנ֣וֹן פִּרְי֑וֹ וְיָצִ֥יצוּ מֵ֝עִ֗יר כְּעֵ֣שֶׂב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: There shall be an handful of corn in the earth upon the top of the mountains; the fruit thereof shall shake like Lebanon: and they of the city shall flourish like grass of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sit nomen ejus benedictum in sæcula ;  ante solem permanet nomen ejus.  Et benedicentur in ipso omnes tribus terræ ;  omnes gentes magnificabunt eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִ֤י שְׁמ֨וֹ ׀ לְֽעוֹלָ֗ם לִפְנֵי־שֶׁמֶשׁ֮ (ינין) [יִנּ֢וֹן] שְׁ֫מ֥וֹ וְיִתְבָּ֥רְכוּ ב֑וֹ כׇּל־גּוֹיִ֥ם יְאַשְּׁרֽוּהוּ׃
verses.king_james: His name shall endure for ever: his name shall be continued as long as the sun: and men shall be blessed in him: all nations shall call him blessed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus Deus Israël,  qui facit mirabilia solus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֤וּךְ ׀ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל עֹשֵׂ֖ה נִפְלָא֣וֹת לְבַדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord God, the God of Israel, who only doeth wondrous things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et benedictum nomen majestatis ejus in æternum,  et replebitur majestate ejus omnis terra. Fiat, fiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָר֤וּךְ ׀ שֵׁ֥ם כְּבוֹד֗וֹ לְע֫וֹלָ֥ם וְיִמָּלֵ֣א כְ֭בוֹדוֹ אֶת־כֹּ֥ל הָאָ֗רֶץ אָ֘מֵ֥ן ׀ וְאָמֵֽן׃
verses.king_james: And blessed be his glorious name for ever: and let the whole earth be filled with his glory; Amen, and Amen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Defecerunt laudes David, filii Jesse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּלּ֥וּ תְפִלּ֑וֹת דָּ֝וִ֗ד בֶּן־יִשָֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended.
